sections.title: Starters
sections.subtitle: Begin your journey with our bold appetizers

items.name: Samosa
items.desc: Fried crispy shell with savory filling of potatoes and peas. Served with mint chutney.

items.name: Samosa Chaat
items.desc: Indian savory snack topped with onion, tomatoes, yogurt, mint and tamarind chutney.

items.name: Crispy Okra Chaat
items.desc: Crispy okra topped with onion, tomatoes, yogurt, mint and tamarind chutney.

items.name: Paani Puri
items.desc: Fried crisp dough filled with flavored water, tamarind chutney, onions, chick-peas and potatoes.

items.name: Avocado Jhalmuri
items.desc: Potato, avocado, peanuts and rice puffs with onion, tomato and house special sauce — a must try!

items.name: Lassoni Gobi
items.desc: Cauliflower tossed with garlic flakes, served in roasted garlic sweet and tangy tomato sauce.

items.name: Mix Veg Pakora
items.desc: Batter-fried veggies, touched with Indian spices. Perfect crispy starter.

items.name: Chicken 65
items.desc: Deep fried chicken originating from Chennai, a spicy quick snack packed with bold South Indian flavors.

items.name: Gobi / Chicken Manchurian
items.desc: Deep fried cauliflower or chicken cubes tossed with tangy sauce and Indian spices.

items.name: Chicken 555
items.desc: Deep fried chicken cubes tossed with house special green chilli sauce, ketchup, cashew nuts and curry leaves.

items.name: Goat Sukkha
items.desc: Bone-in goat cooked with onion and tomatoes, tempered with South Indian spices, coconut powder and cashew nuts.

sections.title: From Snowy Himalayas
sections.subtitle: Authentic Nepali & Tibetan street favorites
sections.note: Served with long-grain Basmati rice · Add Naan & Yellow Daal +$6

items.name: Kathmandu Chilli
items.desc: Choice of shrimp (+$3)/chicken/cottage cheese or cauliflower — deep fried with tangy Nepali spices.

items.name: Nepali Chowmein
items.desc: Nepali-style noodles mixed with seasonal veggies. Add chicken +$1.

items.name: Everest Thukpa
items.desc: Tibetan hot noodle soup (chicken/veg) — a favorite of Everest climbers. Hearty and warming.

items.name: Sherpa Sizzler
items.desc: Sizzling chicken from the tandoor oven served with Nepali-style noodles on a hot iron plate.

items.name: Bhaktapur Fried Rice
items.desc: Special fried rice mixed with seasonal veggies. Add chicken +$1.

sections.title: Tandoor Specials
sections.subtitle: Cooked in clay oven fired to a high heat by charcoal

items.name: Tandoori Vegetables
items.desc: Herbs marinated cauliflower, onions, potatoes, bell peppers and tomatoes roasted to perfection!

items.name: Sofiya Paneer
items.desc: Marinated cheese cubes roasted to perfection with Indian spices in the clay oven.

items.name: Malai Chicken
items.desc: Tender chunks of boneless chicken marinated with cheese and spices, slow-cooked in the tandoor.

items.name: Chicken Tikka
items.desc: Tender chunks of boneless chicken marinated with yogurt and spices, barbecued in clay oven.

items.name: Achari Chicken
items.desc: Chicken cubes marinated in savory pickled spices — bold, tangy and spicy.

items.name: Tandoori Chicken
items.desc: Boned chicken marinated in yogurt with ginger, garlic and herbs, barbecued in clay oven. (4 pcs / 8 pcs)

items.name: Tandoori Wings
items.desc: Boned wings marinated in yogurt with ginger, garlic and herbs — barbecued in clay oven. (7 pcs)

items.name: Murgh Reshami Kebab
items.desc: Spiced ground chicken kebab cooked in clay oven to perfection.

items.name: Lamb Seekh Kebab
items.desc: Ground lamb infused with herbs and spices, shaped on skewers and roasted in the clay oven.

items.name: Adraki Lamb Chops
items.desc: Ginger marinated lamb chops, roasted to fineness, served with cumin tempered potatoes. (4 chops)

items.name: Tandoori Shrimp
items.desc: Prawns marinated in yogurt & spices, served with cumin tempered potatoes.

items.name: Salmon Tikka
items.desc: Grilled salmon fillet suffused with pleasant herbs and spices.

items.name: Tandoori Pomfret
items.desc: Whole bone-in pomfret suffused with pleasant herbs and spices, served with seasonal veggies.

items.name: Tandoori Quadruple Play
items.desc: Combination of four grilled delicacies: Seekh Kebab, Malai Chicken, Tandoori Chicken and Shrimp.

sections.title: Vegetarian Delux
sections.subtitle: Plant-based classics — can be made vegan upon request
sections.note: All items served with long-grain Basmati rice · Add Naan & Yellow Daal +$6

items.name: Dal Fry
items.desc: Combination of yellow and red lentils tempered with garlic, cumin & tomato in butter.

items.name: Dal Himalayan
items.desc: Traditional black lentil and red kidney beans simmered on low fire with red chilies, ginger, garlic and tomatoes.

items.name: Malai Kofta
items.desc: Classic north Indian dish from Mughlai cuisine. Cottage cheese dumplings stuffed with nuts, in cashew nut sauce.

items.name: Chana Pindi
items.desc: Preparation of chickpeas in onions and tomato gravy with Chef's special sauce. Recommended with bhatura.

items.name: Kadai Paneer
items.desc: Sautéed cottage cheese cubes tempered with cumin seeds and blended with Chef's special spices and veggies.

items.name: Shahi Paneer
items.desc: Indian cottage cheese in a thick smooth gravy of cream, cashew, tomato and house spices.

items.name: Saag Paneer / Saag Aloo
items.desc: Fresh spinach cooked with garlic, ginger, onions with a choice of cheese or potatoes.

items.name: Veg Kolhapuri
items.desc: Seasonal vegetables cooked with special blend of sauces and Indian spices. Spicy dish from Kolhapur.

items.name: Veg Jalfrezi
items.desc: Seasonal vegetables cooked with special blend of sauces and Indian spices.

sections.title: Chicken Lovers
sections.subtitle: Tender, marinated and slow-cooked to perfection
sections.note: All items served with long-grain Basmati rice · Add Naan & Yellow Daal +$6

items.name: The Classic Butter Chicken
items.desc: Roasted marinated chicken breast slowly simmered in a rich creamy cashew tomato sauce. Utterly Butterly Delicious.

items.name: Mr. Chicken Tikka Masala
items.desc: Tender chicken roasted in clay oven with chopped tomato and onion gravy, topped with bell peppers.

items.name: Velvety Chicken Korma
items.desc: Tender chicken cooked in mild fragrant cashew gravy. Rich, creamy and mildly spiced.

items.name: Rustic Kadai
items.desc: A rustic dish of chicken sautéed on high heat with chopped onion, bell peppers and spices.

items.name: Chicken Curry
items.desc: Fine chicken cubes cooked in onion & tomato sauce, garnished with coriander.

items.name: Chicken Jalfrezi
items.desc: Chicken cooked with special blend of spices & assorted vegetables. Bold and aromatic.

items.name: Chicken Spinach
items.desc: Tender boneless chicken morsels cooked with spinach with a hint of fenugreek.

items.name: Chicken Vindaloo
items.desc: Chicken cubes with potato in chilli pepper sauce finished with white vinegar — Goan influence.

items.name: Chicken Kolhapuri
items.desc: Chicken cooked with special blend of spices & vegetables. Spicy dish originating from Kolhapur.

sections.title: Lamb & Goat Delights
sections.subtitle: Slow-cooked, tender and richly spiced
sections.note: All items served with long-grain Basmati rice · Add Naan & Yellow Daal +$6

items.name: Lamb Curry
items.desc: Lamb cubes cooked in onion and tomato sauce garnished with coriander.

items.name: Lamb Vindaloo
items.desc: Lamb cubes with potato in chilli pepper sauce finished with white vinegar. Influenced by Goan spices.

items.name: Rogan Josh
items.desc: Lamb cubes cooked with onion, tomato & yogurt base with a blend of aromatic spices. A Kashmiri classic.

items.name: Lamb Korma
items.desc: Tender lamb cubes cooked in cashew curry sauce. Rich, creamy and mildly spiced.

items.name: Goat Curry
items.desc: Bone-in goat cooked in onion and tomato sauce flavored with coriander seeds.

items.name: Nalli Gosht
items.desc: Himalayan special lamb shanks — a signature dish from our executive chef. Slow-braised to fall-off-the-bone perfection.

sections.title: Savory Seafood
sections.subtitle: Ocean-fresh, boldly spiced
sections.note: Served with long-grain Basmati rice · Add Naan & Yellow Daal +$6

items.name: Shrimp Jalfrezi
items.desc: Shrimp cooked with a blend of spices & assorted vegetables.

items.name: Shrimp Curry
items.desc: Shrimp cooked with special blend of spices, onion and grilled tomato.

items.name: Shrimp Malai Curry
items.desc: Shrimp cooked in aromatic cashew curry sauce with coconut milk.

items.name: Fish Curry
items.desc: Fish cooked with onion, grilled tomato in flavorful sauce.

items.name: Goan Fish
items.desc: Marinated fish with curry leaves and Indian spices originating from the west Indian coast.

sections.title: Special Dum Biryanis
sections.subtitle: Slow-cooked, aromatic rice layered with your choice of protein

items.name: Dum Biryani
items.desc: Fragrant basmati rice slow-cooked with aromatic spices. Choose: Veg $14, Paneer $15, Egg $13, Chicken $15, Goat $17, Lamb $17.

items.name: Gongura Dum Biryani
items.desc: Biryani with tangy Gongura (sorrel) leaves — a bold South Indian specialty. Choose: Veg, Paneer, Egg, Chicken, Goat or Lamb.

sections.title: The Taste of the South
sections.subtitle: Bold South Indian flavors — coconut, curry leaves and black pepper
sections.note: All gravy items served with long-grain Basmati rice · Add Naan & Yellow Daal +$6

items.name: Andhra Chicken Curry
items.desc: Chicken cooked with South Indian spices tempered with curry leaves. Bold and fiery.

items.name: Chicken / Goat Chettinad
items.desc: Classic South Indian recipe from Chettinad, cooked in coconut milk with choice of chicken or bone-in goat.

items.name: Chicken / Goat Pepper Fry
items.desc: Choice of chicken or bone-in goat with freshly chopped onions blended with South Indian herbs and black pepper spice.

items.name: Gongura Chicken / Lamb / Goat
items.desc: Choice of chicken/lamb/goat cooked with sour Gongura leaves — a bold South Indian specialty.

sections.title: The Himalayan Specials
sections.subtitle: Executive chef's exclusive creations
sections.note: Served with long-grain Basmati rice · Add Naan & Yellow Daal +$6

items.name: Methi Malai Chicken
items.desc: Thick, mellow and creamy gravy with cashews and fresh fenugreek leaves. A super-hit combination.

items.name: Nalli Gosht
items.desc: Himalayan special lamb shanks — a signature dish from our executive chef. Slow-braised to fall-off-the-bone perfection.

sections.title: Bread Selections
sections.subtitle: Popular Indian leavened breads baked fresh in the clay oven

items.name: Plain Naan
items.desc: Classic plain leavened soft bread baked on the wall lining of the clay oven.

items.name: Garlic Naan
items.desc: Soft leavened bread topped with freshly minced garlic and butter.

items.name: Pesto Naan
items.desc: Soft naan bread topped with aromatic basil pesto, baked to golden perfection.

items.name: Stuffed Breads
items.desc: Choose from Bhattura (fried bread), Lachha Paratha, Pudina Paratha, Aloo Paratha or Onion Kulcha.

items.name: Cheese Naan / Kashmiri Naan
items.desc: Cheese naan stuffed with rich melted cheese, or Kashmiri naan filled with nuts and sweet mixed fruit.

items.name: Himalayan Flames Naan
items.desc: Our signature naan stuffed with ground chicken, onions and garlic — a house specialty!

items.name: Tomato Shorba
items.desc: Fresh tomato reduction flavored with aromatic herbs — sure to ignite your appetite!

items.name: Chicken Egg Drop Soup
items.desc: Appetizing soup made with egg, chicken broth and fresh greens.

items.name: Papadum
items.desc: Roasted crispy Punjabi lentil cracker served with chutney.

items.name: Cucumber Raita
items.desc: Yogurt mixed with fresh cucumbers, topped with roasted cumin.

items.name: Cumin Rice
items.desc: Special rice blended with cumin seeds.

items.name: Masala French Fries
items.desc: Crispy French fries tossed with Indian masala spices. A crowd pleaser!

sections.title: Desserts & Drinks
sections.subtitle: Sweet endings and refreshing beverages (All desserts contain nuts)

items.name: Rasmalai
items.desc: Soft cheese patties soaked in chilled sweetened milk infused with cardamom and saffron.

items.name: Gajar Ka Halwa
items.desc: Traditional Indian carrot pudding cooked with milk, sugar, cardamom and nuts.
items.label: Carrot Pudding

items.name: Kheer
items.desc: Creamy rice pudding slow-cooked in milk with cardamom and saffron.
items.label: Rice Pudding

items.name: Gulab Jamun
items.desc: Soft milk-solid dumplings soaked in sugar syrup flavored with cardamom and rose water.

items.name: Mango Lassi
items.desc: Rich, creamy yogurt drink blended with fresh mango pulp.

items.name: Special House Lemonade
items.desc: Peach / Strawberry / Raspberry / Mango — your choice!

items.name: Soft Drinks
items.desc: Coke, Diet Coke, Sprite, or Lemonade.
